mapper.select: SELECT usa.id, usa.user_id, u.username, u.real_name, usa.scope_type, usa.scope_expression, usa.display_name, usa.remark, usa.expires_at, usa.assigned_by, au.real_name as assigned_by_name, usa.assigned_at FROM user_scope_assignments usa LEFT JOIN users u ON usa.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users au ON usa.assigned_by = au.id WHERE usa.user_id = #{userId} AND usa.deleted = 0 ORDER BY usa.assigned_at DESC

SELECT usa.id, usa.user_id, u.username, u.real_name, usa.scope_type, usa.scope_expression, usa.display_name, usa.remark, usa.expires_at, usa.assigned_by, au.real_name as assigned_by_name, usa.assigned_at FROM user_scope_assignments usa LEFT JOIN users u ON usa.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users au ON usa.assigned_by = au.id WHERE usa.scope_expression = #{scopeExpression} AND usa.deleted = 0 ORDER BY usa.assigned_at DESC
